sc.political.s: FEC filings show Ben & Jerry's parent Unilever's PAC donated 78% to Democratic candidates 2020-2024.
sc.dei.s: Published DEI commitments including 2020 racial justice pledge; disclosed diversity data in sustainability reports.
sc.environment.s: B Corp certified 2021; Unilever science-based targets approved by SBTi. No EPA enforcement actions against Ben & Jerry's found.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor practice findings or OSHA violations specific to Ben & Jerry's operations found.
sc.charity.s: Ben & Jerry's Foundation donated $10M+ annually; disclosed 5% pre-tax profit commitment to social causes.
sc.animals.s: Certified Leaping Bunny cruelty-free; dairy sourcing certified by Fairtrade USA since 2005.
sc.privacy.s: No documented data breaches or FTC privacy enforcement actions found.
sc.execPay.s: No public disclosure of CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio found.

charity.focus: Social justice, environmental justice, racial equity, voter rights, immigration reform, grassroots organizing

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
